claim: No Stable, release, complete conformance, package-parity, or publication claim is made.

semantics.nativeBasis: A labelled editable combobox owns a multi-select listbox and named remove actions; hidden inputs preserve repeated form values.
semantics.rolePolicy: Combobox, listbox, options, token labels, repeated form values, maximum state, invalid, required, disabled, read-only, busy, and recovery state remain baseline; summary is absent when disabled.

keyboard.behavior: Moves through the filter and token removal actions.

nonColor: Checkmarks, token text, accessible names, and structure accompany color.
responsive: Tokens wrap, overlays are bounded, and logical properties support narrow and RTL layouts.
consumerResponsibilities: Provide localized labels and stable unique option values.
Own async transport and append options deliberately when onLoadMore is invoked.
Do not claim Stable until all promotion evidence is current.
